criteriaResults.evidence: Module whisperdeep/chronicle.py importable. `from whisperdeep.chronicle import build_chronicle, write_chronicle` exits 0. build_chronicle(game, *, name=None, fixed_timestamp=None) -> str takes Game positionally with documented `name` keyword (default 'the unnamed' via DEFAULT_NAME). write_chronicle(game, path, *, name=None, fixed_timestamp=None) -> str returns the resolved path string. Module docstring (chronicle.py:1-39) documents the four required sections (title / metadata / notable events / epitaph) and the timestamp policy (ISO-8601 UTC + fixed_timestamp injection).

Built Game.from_seed(seed=1, whisperer=True), called observe_kind('skitterer','monster'), end_run('quit'), build_chronicle(name='Mara', fixed_timestamp='2026-06-12T00:00:00Z'). Output starts with `# Mara — A Whisperdeep Chronicle`, contains `## Metadata` with bullet lines for seed:1, name:Mara, floors_reached, turns, adapter, timestamp:2026-06-12T00:00:00Z; `## Notable Events` lists run_started/room_entered/first_sight/run_ended/epitaph bullets in order; `## Epitaph` followed by a blockquote line drawn from prose_pool['epitaph'] ('Some doors open only one way. You have learned which.').

EVENT_TYPES = ('run_started','run_ended','entered_room','killed_monster','low_hp','found_item','descended','first_sight','room_entered','epitaph') -- all original 7 + Sprint-8's first_sight/room_entered + new 'epitaph'. prose_pool.json['epitaph'] has 10 distinct non-empty strings (>=8). All other 9 keys still have >=8 distinct entries (pool sizes: run_started=18, run_ended=9, entered_room=9, killed_monster=9, low_hp=9, found_item=9, descended=9, first_sight=9, room_entered=9).

Game.end_run defined at game.py:317. With whisperer=True: first call returns True, publishes one run_ended whisper and one epitaph whisper. Second call returns False (idempotent flag _run_ended at game.py:327). Whisper counts for run_ended and epitaph remain at 1 after second call. With whisperer=False: events is None, end_run returns False without raising; sets _run_ended so subsequent calls also no-op.

End-to-end with seed=1, observe_kind('skitterer'), end_run, the chronicle's '## Notable Events' section bullets are: [run_started@t0:f0] / [room_entered@t0:f0] / [first_sight@t0:f0] / [run_ended@t1:f0] / [epitaph@t2:f0] in chronological order (turn-monotonic). Each bullet starts with `- ` and contains the whisper text. Run-started prose, first_sight name 'wretched skitterer', run_ended prose all appear verbatim. tests/test_sprint10.py::test_c5_notable_events_chronological exercises the descended path and passes.

write_chronicle to a non-existent subdirectory created the parent dir (chronicle.py:281-282 mkdir parents=True), wrote the file, returned the resolved path string. File content == build_chronicle(...) output for the same args (verified equal). First char is '#'. test_c6_write_chronicle_overwrites confirms overwrite semantics.

default_chronicle_path at chronicle.py:90 produces paths under '<cwd>/chronicles/seed-<seed>-<slug>-floor-<F>.md'. Verified seed=1/Mara, seed=2/Mara, seed=1/Devon all yield distinct paths under chronicles/, all end with .md. slugify_name('Mara the Lost') -> 'mara-the-lost'; slugify_name('Foo/Bar baz') -> 'foo-bar-baz' (filesystem-safe lowercase kebab-case).

`python -m whisperdeep --help` lists --name, --chronicle PATH, --chronicle-fixed-timestamp ISO, and --no-chronicle. Ran `python -m whisperdeep --seed 1 --headless --name Mara --chronicle TMPCHR/chronicle.md --chronicle-fixed-timestamp 2026-06-12T00:00:00Z`: exit 0, file exists, starts with `# Mara — A Whisperdeep Chronicle`, contains 'seed: 1' in metadata. Default behavior (no --chronicle flag) writes nothing -- confirmed by test_c8_cli_no_chronicle_when_unset.

Two subprocess invocations of `python -m whisperdeep --seed 11 --headless --name Mara --chronicle <path> --chronicle-fixed-timestamp 2026-06-12T00:00:00Z` produce byte-identical files (diff yields no output). Seed=12 differs from seed=11 in the metadata seed line. build_chronicle is byte-equal across two builds with the same seed+name+fixed_timestamp.

Chronicle's `## Epitaph` section is followed by a single '> ...' Markdown blockquote line. For seed=11: '> Some doors open only one way. You have learned which.' -- text appears verbatim in prose_pool['epitaph']. Two fresh Games at seed=11 produce byte-identical chronicles (same epitaph chosen). The blockquote text equals the most-recent epitaph whisper text (handled by _select_epitaph at chronicle.py:254).

whisperer=False -> chronicle non-empty, starts with `# `, contains name and the placeholder bullet '(no whispers were recorded during this run)'. Game with end_run never called still builds successfully and contains the run_started whisper. Long name ('a very long name '*5) renders without exception. Unicode 'Marä Köld' preserved on str return AND in UTF-8 file write.

Ran `python -m whisperdeep --seed 1 --headless --name Mara --chronicle c.md --dump-whispers w.json`. whispers.json contains 2 whispers (run_started, room_entered); both texts appear verbatim in chronicle.md. The chronicle additionally includes run_ended + epitaph (because --chronicle triggers end_run after dump_whispers writes). Chronicle is a stable, ordered superset of the dump.

tests/test_sprint08.py: all tests pass within the full pytest run (86/86 prior tests). EVENT_TYPES contains 'first_sight','room_entered' AND the original 7 Sprint-7 names. `python -m whisperdeep --seed 1 --headless --no-whisperer` exits 0 with grid-only output. `--no-panel --dump-whispers` works (test_c13_no_panel_dump_still_works PASS). --panel-width 20 functional via Sprint-8 regression tests.

Ran tests/test_sprint01.py + tests/test_sprint07.py + tests/test_sprint08.py + tests/test_generator.py + tests/test_game.py: 86 passed. Two subprocess runs of `--seed 1 --headless --no-whisperer` produce byte-identical 3280-byte stdout. seed=1 vs seed=2 differ. All canonical glyphs (#, ., +, >, @) present in seed=1 headless output.

tests/test_sprint10.py contains 34 distinct `test_*` functions (well above the >=12 requirement). Coverage spans every C1-C12 scenario plus C13/C14/C17/C18 regression and layering checks. 34/34 pass under `pytest tests/test_sprint10.py`. No imports of requests/httpx/urllib/anthropic/openai (grep returns no matches).

docs/whisperdeep.md has a Sprint-10 status banner (lines 9-31) AND a dedicated `## Chronicles (Sprint 10)` section (line 360+). Documents: (1) four sections of the chronicle, (2) timestamp policy ISO-8601 + fixed_timestamp injection (lines 423-429), (3) epitaph event type (lines 382-389), (4) --name / --chronicle / --chronicle-fixed-timestamp / --no-chronicle CLI flags (lines 405-408), (5) default chronicle filename pattern under chronicles/ (lines 410-419), (6) deferral note 'Cross-run death legends' (lines 28-30 + 434+).

AST inspection of whisperdeep/chronicle.py imports: __future__, datetime, os, re, pathlib, typing, .game (TYPE_CHECKING), .whisperer (TYPE_CHECKING). NO imports of llm/render/panel. whisperdeep/events.py contains no 'chronicle' substring. whisperdeep/llm.py contains no 'chronicle' substring. whisperdeep/game.py top-level imports: __future__, dataclasses, typing, .entity, .events, .floor, .world (NO chronicle); cli.py imports chronicle lazily inside _write_chronicle_if_requested (cli.py:239). EVENT_TYPES gained 'epitaph' additively at the end.

Metadata block (chronicle.py:218-227) emits machine-readable bullet lines '- seed: <int>', '- name: <str>', '- floors_reached: <int>', '- turns: <int>', '- adapter: <str>', '- timestamp: <ISO>'. Verified seed=7,name='Mara',fixed_timestamp='2026-06-12T00:00:00Z' produces correctly parseable lines via '^- ?<key>:' regex. Default ISO timestamp ends with 'Z' (chronicle.py:114-119). Block sits between the H1 line and the `## Notable Events` header.

regressionResults.evidence: Full pytest suite: 120 passed in 4.61s (34 sprint-10 + 86 prior). tests/test_sprint01.py + tests/test_sprint07.py + tests/test_sprint08.py + tests/test_generator.py + tests/test_game.py = 86 passing. --no-whisperer byte-determinism confirmed. EVENT_TYPES superset preserved. All Sprint-8 CLI flags (--no-panel/--panel-width/--no-whisperer/--dump-whispers) still functional.

summary: Sprint 10 PASS, 18/18 criteria. Chronicle module is layered correctly (no llm/render/panel imports), public API documented. EVENT_TYPES additive ('epitaph' appended; original 10 preserved); prose_pool gains 10 distinct epitaph entries. Game.end_run is idempotent and a safe no-op without a whisperer. CLI flags --name / --chronicle / --chronicle-fixed-timestamp / --no-chronicle all present in --help and functional end-to-end. Determinism verified across processes for the same seed+name+fixed_timestamp; seed-sensitive across different seeds. 34 new tests in tests/test_sprint10.py, 0 network imports, 120/120 total tests passing. Documentation includes a Sprint-10 status banner and a Chronicles section covering all required topics including the cross-run death-legends deferral.
